repair_candidate.summary: Repair #87681 by rebasing/refitting @sweetcornna's focused exec/OOM diagnostic patch onto current main. Preserve the existing behavior: when Linux exec children are likely wrapped with raised oom_score_adj and a bare SIGKILL is reported, expand the user-facing failure reason with the cgroup/OOM-score hint; normalize numeric signal 9; derive the gate from the spawn-time child env rather than ambient process.env; keep non-Linux, opt-out, timeout, shell-failure, and non-SIGKILL paths unchanged.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(exec): explain Linux SIGKILL OOM-score hints
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair #87681 on current main while preserving @sweetcornna's focused four-file exec/OOM diagnostic scope.
- Expand bare Linux SIGKILL exec failure text only when the child OOM-score raise path is active, including numeric signal 9 normalization.
- Keep the gate tied to the spawn-time child env so per-child OPENCLAW_CHILD_OOM_SCORE_ADJ=0 opt-outs do not get the hint.

## Credit
Source PR: #87681 by @sweetcornna. Canonical report: #69242 by @schksw-ctrl. Related OOM-score context: #70404 by @novahe.

## Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/bash-tools.exec-runtime.test.ts src/process/linux-oom-score.test.ts
- git diff --check
- node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run -- env OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed

Clownfish repair artifact: live-pr-inventory-20260618T170451-003.
validation_commands: node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run -- env OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed
